title: Mine On Life
description: This mod adds the alien guns from High On Life into minecraft.
body:
Introduction

Introduction

Most things from this mod are from the game High on Life. this mod adds alien guns which each have their own stats. As of right now, this mod is just for creative use. You cannot get the guns in survival mode. Later this mod will include crashed warp bases, enemies, biomes, and bosses. 

Name-Stats-Notes

Kenny- Pistol with medium damage- A very well rounded gun.

Gus- Shotgun with short range, high power- Very powerful against singular enemies.

Sweezy- Automatic pistol with quick firing speed with low damage- Very affective against large groups.

Creature- Shoots out small creatures which he gives birth to, when they hit a entity, they fall on the ground and follow that entity and attack it for a short time and then die- affective in short/medium groups of mobs


Whats next?

The next update for this mod will be the first which effects survival mode. You will be able to find warp bases with aliens, like in High on Life, and inside there's a chance there is a chest which has kenny inside.


Contact me

If you ever have questions or suggestions, contact my discord: 𝟠𝔹𝕒𝕝𝕝𝔹𝕠𝕚𝟙𝟚𝟛#0559
